practice_goal: Frame and verify a small local fix
Debug from a reproduction and ranked hypotheses
Implement a feature from an acceptance vector
Recover cleanly after a fresh context or handoff
Improve AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md and validate discovery
Complete independent work in an isolated worktree
Add one deterministic hook with a safe failure mode
Package a repeated procedure as a reusable skill
Build and run a representative evaluation set
Run a bounded automated loop with observability
Trigger and correctly honor a human safety gate
